summary: Internal CRM, ERP/capacity, contacts, opportunities, and pipeline data are simulated for demo purposes.
assumptions: Opportunity values are illustrative and should not be represented as BTX production data.
Capacity values are modeled to demonstrate CRO prioritization, not to quote real shop availability.
Public market and contract signals are represented as static snapshots in this demo.
Future production adapters should preserve IDs and provenance while replacing static snapshots with authenticated API data.
